item.title: My fiancée released her game today after 10 years of dev. Super proud of her and wanted to share!
item.description: She always works hard, but the last ~4 months have just been nonstop. Many sleepless nights and many "WTF"s later, and now it's out! I'm so happy to see her finally ship her game (Potions: A Curious Tale). I joke that there's the first 90% of the project and then there's the second 90%. It's so hard to get across the finish line and you feel like you're so close for so long.
item.dc:creator: XenusParadox

item.title: Pics from my phone
item.description:
Maybe I'll clear them, maybe I won't! Who knows!
I'd sell my soul for it, if I had a soul.
Took my kids to the skate park a while back. Glad to see kids today believe in tradition.
Dog tax! This is Venus, we adopted her last month, and I only have a handful of pictures of her because she's got infinite zoomies. As always, be excellent to each other, and party on dudes!

item.title: We found Bruno at 7 weeks old with terrible slashes on his head - eventually requiring surgery to fix.
item.description:
The cuts would scab and heal over, but abscesses would form underneath, burst and run with pus and blood. The recurring infection would also take a toll on his energy.
We finally scheduled surgery to open up his scalp and clean out all the infection underneath. Looked pretty horrible right afterward.
Bruno looking like Frankenstein's Monster with all those nasty stitches.
Looking a bit like the RCA Victor dog.
A couple weeks later, stitches came out. Healing up nicely!
Recent picture. Healed up really well, and no more problems with abscesses. Still has a scar on the left side of his head without fur, which gets busted up pretty easily (because he goes through life uncautiously head-first) but he looks and feels so much better. He is a happy boy and much loved!
Just took this. Bruno having a nap and snoring on a rainy day.
item.dc:creator: ElBurroGrande68

item.title: Elon Musk is lashing out at MacKenzie Scott, Jeff Bezos' ex, for donating billions to charities for women and minorities
item.description: Elon Musk isn't a fan of MacKenzie Scott's charitable giving. "'Super rich ex-wives who hate their former spouse' should filed be listed among 'Reasons that Western Civilization died,'" Musk wrote in an X post referencing Jeff Bezos' ex-wife. Musk was responding to another user who said Scott had been giving money to organizations that "deal with issues of race and/or gender." “Super rich ex-wives who hate their former spouse” should filed be listed among “Reasons that Western Civilization died” — Elon Musk (@elonmusk) March 6, 2024 It's unclear why Musk singled out Scott in particular, but he has been an avowed and extremely vocal critic of efforts to promote diversity, equity, and inclusion. "DEI is just another word for racism. Shame on anyone who uses it," Musk wrote on X in January. This isn't the first time Musk has slammed Scott over her philanthropy. In May 2022, Musk said he planned to vote Republican because he thought the Democratic Party had given his companies Tesla and Space X "a very cold shoulder." Musk said he thought his companies were being sidelined partly because Scott had donated to "PACs posing as charities." "It's safe to say that MacKenzie [ahem] Scott is not exactly a big fan of her ex-husband. Unfortunately, a lot of others are getting caught in the crossfire," Musk wrote in an X post at the time. Scott was married to Bezos for 25 years before they finalized their divorce in 2019. Scott received $38 billion worth of Amazon shares in the settlement terms. Since then, Scott has made waves with her philanthropy. In 2022, Scott said in a Medium post that she'd donated nearly $2 billion to "343 organizations supporting the voices and opportunities of people from underserved communities." Scott's donations that year included $275 million to Planned Parenthood. Unlike most philanthropists, who dispense funding for causes that impose specific reporting requirements, Scott has adopted a no-strings-attached approach toward her giving. This has won Scott plaudits from organizations who relish the autonomy she has given them. "The most cherished gifts are definitely those that are unrestricted because a complex university has a wide variety of needs," Ruth Simmons, the then-president of Prairie View A&M University, told the Associated Press. The university received a $50 million donation from Scott in 2020, one of the largest donations it had ever gotten. Scott's ex, Bezos, has a different approach to giving. He told CNN in November 2022 that while he planned to give away his wealth, he'd found engaging in philanthropy as difficult as building Amazon. "The hard part is figuring out how to do it in a levered way," Bezos told CNN. "There are a bunch of ways that I think you could do ineffective things, too. So you have to think about it carefully, and you have to have brilliant people on the team," Bezos said. To be sure, Musk does engage in philanthropy as well. In 2021, Musk donated $5.7 billion in Tesla shares to the Musk Foundation, a charity he started with his brother, Kimbal, in 2002. The foundation has donated to various causes, including renewable energy, space exploration, and artificial intelligence, according to its website. The group donated $160 million to nonprofits in 2021, including $55 million to the St Jude Children's Research Hospital, Bloomberg reported. https://www.businessinsider.com/elon-musk-goes-after-jeff-bezos-ex-wife-mackenzie-scott-2024-3 MAYBE AN EXPLANATION? https://www.businessinsider.com/elon-musk-illegal-drugs-use-ketamine-microdosing-risks-2024-1?op=1

item.title: Starting T this week and I'm nervous, so here's a queer meme dump
item.description:
I'm nonbinary/masculine leaning.
(Sorry, I stole this from imgur but the source is: panini.artz_ on Instagram. I actually stole this from a pride month meme dump, before I ever watched the owl house. I'm so glad I watched the owl house. )
I have a surgical consult for top surgery in April. On eclipse day, actually.
I have waffled back and forth on starting T for years
My main concerns: -worried what effects this will have on my long term relationship. - I already have hyperhidrosis and my sweat smells like burnt onions, what if I sweat more and smell worse somehow? - body hair. I'm already hairy. I stopped shaving about 6 years ago, but before that I'd shave everything. I have a hairy butt. Hairy chest. And have sported a crazy treasure trail. I am worried I might end up like Sasquatch
I'm starting with microdosing. I'll be taking half a regular dose.
I'm not a man. I'm nonbinary. I fluctuate somewhere between genderless void and slightly masculine leaning.
I'm tired of being misgendered as female. I work as a cashier right now. "How are you, miss?" "Give your toy to the nice lady" "Excuse me ma'am" I'm over it. I don't expect to be read non-binary or for people to know my pronouns are they/them without me saying (even though I have them visible on my name badge). I'd prefer to be misgendered as a guy. Then at least they recognize I'm not a female, y'know?
I want the deeper voice.
I want the more angular face, maybe with some facial hair. I've always wanted mutton chops
I want to be able to get muscle
I want my hips to look different
I want the *redacted*
I'm making the right choice for me
But I'm still scared.
Hormone replacement therapy effects everyone differently, and there's so much I cannot predict about it
But I want it. My insurance approved the use of gel, so I don't even need to give myself shots.
My girlfriend is worried I'll get back hair. I've reassured her I'll get my back waxed. No problem.
My girlfriend is also worried about how she feels with me presenting more masculine. She's not attracted to men. She was thinking only men have facial hair. But. Facial hair is for everyone.
I will not conform to a gender.
(Other than Ranibow sprimkle)
I still consider myself lesbian. I connect with that identity.
I am still they/them.
I'm still me.
I've got bad hips, so I'll never be as swift as a coursing river. But I can rage pretty good
I'm getting my Rx tomorrow.
This is my favorite trans masc meme.
item.dc:creator: PlatypusInterrobang

item.title: Meme Dump 30 out of 200
item.description:
Hey imgur ~ thanks for joining me on another phone cleaning meme dump adventure. Hope your week has been going well !
Best sound
E.
Always lmao the trauma is strong
Chankla lvl 100 must be wild
Have a daughter instead ♡
All. The. Time. - I just have manners and trauma so im nice to people
"Oh, that's terrifying"
Canada too ;--;
Tomorrow is Friday ! Make sure you poop and cry on corporate time ~ stay hydrated folks #memes #memedump #funny #among_us #gaming

item.title: So I saw this post a long time ago...
item.description:
Kept this on my phone for two years going "wow, I wonder what that version tastes like". but depression kept me from it. Decided today would be the day I tried it!
It turned out pretty good! It made it a lot fluffier than I usually get out of box cake, and you could really taste the strawberry.
This is what I used, just in case someone wanted to know. They're filld with strawberry jam and lemon curd. I'm just sharing because I thought it was cool that it does work.
Here's some dogs for your time.

item.title: This Roman lighthouse is the oldest surviving lighthouse in England
item.description: This Roman lighthouse is the oldest surviving lighthouse in England and one of the oldest in the world. It is located on the south-eastern side of Dover, Kent. It dates from around 46–50 AD, during the reign of Emperor Claudius. In comparison to modern lighthouses, its height of just 25.4 metres is quite short, but in its day, it was a towering landmark. It was built using flint local to the area and mortar. It was an important feature of the Roman trade routes and military operations; its flickering light was critical in guiding ships safely to shore. After nearly 2,000 years, the original Roman stonework on the seaward side is weather-worn, and today it stands at just 19 metres. high.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: The 414th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
OC
Me IRL
OC
My addition
Mood
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
My addition at the bottom
@CodyBurkett
I've seen enough...
I had to clean this up so it would be legible
This one, too
Yes
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
